use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms and dialogs
Icon-only buttons for compact UI actions
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Includes accessibility features like focus-visible ring and disabled state handling. Suitable for any web application requiring interactive action triggers.
